payment.title: Booking Payment
payment.subtitle: Secure payment via banking system. Please verify the details before confirming.
payment.successSubtitle: Thank you for your payment. You will be redirected to "My Payments" page.
payment.cancelSubtitle: Payment was not completed. Please try again or choose another method.
payment.noPaymentsDesc: Your payment history will appear here after you complete a booking.
payment.paidDescription: This booking has already been paid. No further action required.
payment.cancelledDescription: Payment was not completed. You can try again.
